title: Medicament delivery device comprising a wipe assembly
abstract: A medicament delivery device comprising a housing member and a wipe assembly, the wipe assembly comprising a sterilising swab, and a sealing member, wherein the sealing member is attached to the housing member, and wherein the sterilising swab is kept in a sealed compartment by the sealing member, which sealed compartment may be opened to extract the sterilising swab.
claims:
Claims Medicament delivery device comprising a housing member and a wipe assembly, the wipe assembly comprising, - a sterilising swab, and - a sealing member, wherein the sealing member is attached to the housing member, and wherein the sterilising swab is kept in a sealed compartment by the sealing member, which sealed compartment may be opened to extract the sterilising swab. Medicament delivery device according to claim 1 , wherein the sealed compartment is formed by the sealing member such that the sealed compartment is substantially flat along a surface of the housing member. Medicament delivery device according to claim 2, wherein the housing member is part of an outer casing of the medicament delivery device. Medicament delivery device according to claim 1 , wherein the housing member is removable cap of the medicament delivery device. Medicament delivery device according to claim 1 , wherein the sterilising swab is a wet wipe. Medicament delivery device according to claim 5, wherein the wet wipe comprises a sterilising substance such as alcohol or chlorhexidine. Medicament delivery device according to claim 1 , wherein the sealing member is a flexible adhesive film which may be removed by peeling the adhesive film off the housing member such that the sealed compartment is opened, to enable the sterilising swab to be extracted. 8. Medicament delivery device according to claim 7, wherein the sterilising swab is held in a hermetically sealed environment between the adhesive film and the 

 housing member until the sealed compartment is opened by a first-time removal of the adhesive film. 9. Medicament delivery device according to claim 8, wherein the adhesive film may be re-attached to the housing member after removal of the sterilising swab to restore an outer appearance of the housing member and the adhesive film. 10. Medicament delivery device according to claim 9, wherein the sealing member is an adhesive flexible plastic pocket, forming the sealed compartment, which flexible plastic pocket may be opened to enable the sterilising swab to be extracted. 1 1. Medicament delivery device according to claim 10, wherein the sterilising swab is held in a hermetically sealed environment within the plastic pocket until the plastic pocket is opened for a first time. 12. Medicament delivery device according to claim 1 1 , wherein the plastic pocket may be reclosed after removal of the sterilising swab to restore an outer appearance of the housing member and the plastic pocket. 13. Medicament delivery device according to claim 7 or 10, wherein the sealing member comprises an adhesive label of a medicament delivery device. 14. A medicament delivery device according to any of the claims 1 -13, wherein the medicament delivery device is an autoinjector. 15. A medicament delivery device according to claim 1 -13, wherein the medicament delivery device is a pen injector. 16. A medicament delivery device according to claim 1 -13, wherein the medicament delivery device is a safety syringe.
